extraction.one_line_summary: NIBALI attacked final Stelvio descent, caught LANDA in final meters with superior cornering, DUMOULIN retained pink despite stomach issues costing 2:18
tactical_patterns: DUMOULIN's mechanical/clothing stop respected initially, but LANDA and NIBALI exploited fraying alliance before full regrouping completed
NIBALI prioritized descending aggression over summit attacks, catching LANDA purely through risk-taking cornering technique on wet roads
QUINTANA unable or unwilling to counter NIBALI's descent attack, revealing descending weakness when isolated from team support
POZZOVIVO consistently finished with GC group despite size disadvantage, suggesting superior high-altitude climbing economy at extreme altitude

rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: attacked descent not summit, won stage through technical superiority despite inferior climbing shown on ascent
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: strongest climber on final Stelvio ascent, gapped group solo but lost stage through conservative descending
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: neutral: retained pink despite 2:18 loss from stomach illness, group's initial respect shows psychological control
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: followed NIBALI but couldn't counter, third place suggests declining form or tactical paralysis without team
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: positive: finished 31 seconds behind winner consistently in GC group, punching above weight class literally
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: fifth place suggests recovering form, riding independently without team support structure
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: dropped significantly from GC group, mentioned losing time confirms poor form trajectory continues
